---
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output: 
  rmdformats::readthedown:
    toc_depth: 2
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(knitr)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE,  
                      message=FALSE, 
                      warning=FALSE, 
                      results = 'asis', 
                      fig.width=7, 
                      fig.height = 7,
                      tidy = TRUE, 
                      tidy.opts = list(comment = FALSE))
```

```{css, echo=FALSE}
#content{
    max-width:1920px;
}

.main-container {
  max-width: 1920px !important;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
}
```

```{r data, echo = FALSE}
source("reportFunctions.R")

options(future.globals.maxSize = 600000 * 1024^2)
options(future.seed = TRUE)

myoptions<-read_file_map("fileList2.txt", do_unlist=FALSE)
email=myoptions$email
affiliation=get_affiliation(myoptions)
task_name=myoptions$task_name
```

---
title: "MEcell cluster - `r task_name`"
author:
- name: `r email`
  affiliation: `r affiliation`
---

# Individual Samples

```{r}
library(fs)

curwd = gsub("^/panfs/accrepfs.vampire", "", getwd())

result = ""

html_map=read_file_map("fileList1.txt", do_unlist=FALSE)
for (fname in names(html_map)) {
  fpath=gsub("^/panfs/accrepfs.vampire", "", html_map[[fname]])
  rpath=fs::path_rel(fpath, start = curwd)
  result = paste0(result, '<a href="', rpath, '" target="_blank">', fname, "</a>\n\n")
}

writeLines(result, "details.rmd")
```

```{r child="details.rmd"}
```
